# ØRIONS — Boutique Creative Agency, Bangkok

> ØRIONS (orions.agency) is a boutique creative agency in Bangkok — "where aesthetic meets algorithm." It builds memorable brands by hand, and its own AI with taste, fusing art with equation. In an era of AI flood (mass AI content flooding feeds ~4.6× faster) and 1.7-second attention spans, the world doesn't need louder or wider — it craves depth strong enough to make people stop and look. Founder & Creative Director: Ratthakan Suwanphakdee (รัฐกันต์ สุวรรณภักดี).

## What we do — three areas
1. Boutique Brand Consultancy — high-end brand consultancy that digs to the root of the problem, fusing creative data with sharp, measurable strategy.
2. Aesthetic Intelligence — building AI that has not just logic and numbers but a transplanted DNA of taste and a deep understanding of high-level aesthetics.
3. Creative Tech Platforms — building ØRIONS's own platform ecosystem to revolutionise and break the limits of the creative industry across every dimension.

## The system — four innovations, one universe powered by VÆST
- VÆST (The Core Engine) — the AI Creative Director. "Computation is nothing without taste." The heart and backbone of ØRIONS: while ordinary AI computes fast but is blind to beauty, VÆST has the mindset and soul of a top creative director embedded in its core — it understands rebellion, the rhythm of white space, and the depth of aesthetics. It is the translator from art to equation, keeping everything ØRIONS ships elegant enough to make people stop.
- First Draft (The Canvas) — a screenwriting & production platform, powered by VÆST. Turns a blank page into powerful structure: from raw idea to screenplay structure, script and production plan in moments — layered, distinctive storytelling, not flat bot text. Built to buy back time so humans can spend their energy crafting detail and the deepest human touch.
- Routte (The Compass) — a curated AI trip planner, powered by VÆST. Travel that wants taste, not just a map: Routte acts as a personal curator through VÆST's mind, selecting experiences through the lens of art, architecture and lifestyle. Every trip has a seamless pacing, like a high-end travel magazine published for you alone.
- SONAR (The Radar) — a quantum-inspired creative CRM, driven by VÆST. "Turning dry numbers into a cultural phenomenon." Ends the era of CRM that only stores names and emails to spam promotions: SONAR processes first-party brand and behavioural data through a quantum-mathematics concept to see complex, overlapping, multi-dimensional needs. When quantum-level data is fed into VÆST, it condenses into hyper-personalised creativity — as if a creative director analysed each customer's soul and designed the work one-to-one. This is how ØRIONS turns dry numbers into masterpieces.

## Belief / manifesto (Thinking)
The world isn't short of content, it's drowning in it — the answer is not louder but deeper. The sharpest story wins, not the loudest. As a boutique brand consultancy ØRIONS still crafts brands by hand — diagnose first (The Refinement Session), then treat with craft, then deliver and measure — and VÆST (taste-driven intelligence) elevates every output. Technology is the structure; taste is what gives it life. Full manifesto: https://orions.agency/thinking

## Taglines
- Where aesthetic meets algorithm. (primary)
- A boutique creative agency, powered by its own AI. (positioning)
- Computation is nothing without taste. (VÆST)
- Turning dry numbers into a cultural phenomenon. (SONAR)

## How to start
Tell ØRIONS the brief, or partner to build the future of creative work. Book a free 45-minute call (no obligation).
